entry.value: [["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6","92eaaf8a-186d-4e61-8b27-58bacc439ad7","o|","auto","b|F","a|","eb2dfd19-eb01-4deb-9f2d-71afabc875e9","a|D|8","id","name","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","rootTaskUuid","feedbackStates","toolUseStates","chatHistory","draftExchange","a|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R|S|T","Burp插件单例模式封装MontoyaAPI日志\n","2026-03-05T01:49:48.621Z","2026-03-06T07:41:48.812Z","claude-opus-4-6","isAgentConversation","a|Z","b|T","o|a|b","n|0","5ade4c4d-7a19-4f69-87ba-784bd8935fc7","request_message","rich_text_json_repr","status","a|f|g|h","","type","content","a|k|l","doc","a|k","paragraph","o|o|p","a|q","o|m|n|r","draft","o|i|j|s|t","o|U|D|V|W|X|Y|C|B|B|c|d|e|9|9|C|u","a|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|R|S|Q|T","修复DataTable指标切换不刷新bug\n","2026-03-06T07:42:50.767Z","2026-03-06T08:55:58.184Z","gpt-5-4","baselineTimestamp","a|Z|11","o|12|b|d","2846bed7-a9a9-4d43-bf80-49877838cf2a","o|w|8|x|y|z|10|C|B|B|13|d|14|9|C|9|u","o|E|v|15","shown","workspaceQuestions","a|17|18","o|19|B|C","o|7|8|9|A|B|C|16|1A"],"1B"]
